title: Python-chess
text: Home * Software * Utilities * python-chess python-chess , a chess software library created by Niklas Fiekas , written in Python and released under the GPL v3 . The goal was to create a simple and relatively highlevel library [1] . It supports Python 3.5.3+ and PyPy3 [2] .
